summary: Frontend e2e testing for Stage 7 Phase 3 (6 new pages + sidebar + regression). All requested flows verified end-to-end against live backend at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Sidebar nav (nav-tax-years, nav-bank-transactions, nav-properties, nav-rubbish-bin) renders and routes correctly. TaxYears lists FY2024 and FY2025 from GET /api/tax-years; clicking a card navigates to /tax-years/FY2024. TaxYearBreakdown shows the 3 summary cards plus Income/Deductions sections. End-to-end manual entry: navigated /tax-years/FY2024 -> Add manual entry -> filled Type=Deduction, Section=Donations / Gifts, Amount=50, Description='TEST donation playwright' -> POST /api/tax-return-items 200 -> redirected back to /tax-years/FY2024 -> Donations section appeared, expanded, item found and successfully deleted via DELETE /api/tax-return-items/{id}. BankTransactions: empty-state shown, status & property filters interactable. RubbishBin: empty-state visible (rubbish-bin-empty testid). Properties: Heathridge + Waggrakine cards rendered; added a use period (date_from=2023-07-01, date_to=2024-06-30, use_type=rental default, notes='TEST playwright') via POST /api/properties/{id}/periods, period appeared, then removed via DELETE /api/properties/{id}/periods/{period_id}. Regression smoke: Dashboard, Evidence Register, Missing Evidence, Reports, Settings all load with no UI errors. No console pageerrors observed.
critical_code_review_comments: ItemRow delete + Properties remove period + RubbishBin restore/permanent-delete use window.confirm/window.alert — fine for a single-user internal app but consider migrating to a shadcn AlertDialog for consistency with the rest of the UI.

BankTransactions.jsx confidence filter for the 'Add to return' button checks t.confidence === 'Confirmed' || 'Likely' — fine, but consider also surfacing this filter to the UI so users can quickly find candidates.
ManualEntry.jsx initialYear validation falls back to FY2024 if query param is not FY2024/FY2025 — good defensive default.

TaxYearBreakdown classifies section as income/deduction by inspecting items[0].income_or_deduction — relies on backend uniformity per section; acceptable but a section-level field on the GET /api/tax-years/{year} response would be more robust.
All 6 new pages correctly use process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL via lib/api.js — no hardcoded URLs detected.

data-testid coverage on interactive elements is comprehensive (tax-year-card-{year}, tax-item-delete-{id}, add-period-btn-{id}, save-period-btn, manual-submit, restore-doc-{id}, permanent-delete-doc-{id}, filter-status, filter-property, use-txn-{id}) — excellent.
seed_data_creation: Test entries created via UI and cleaned up in-test: 1 tax_return_item (TEST donation playwright, FY2024/donations, $50) created then deleted; 1 property use_period on prop-heathridge (2023-07-01 → 2024-06-30, rental, TEST playwright) created then deleted. No residual TEST_ data left behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Stage 7 Phase 3 frontend pages (TaxYears, TaxYearBreakdown, BankTransactions, RubbishBin, Properties, ManualEntry) verified end-to-end against live backend. Database is largely empty for tax_return_items so summary numbers are $0/$0 — expected. Properties are pre-seeded with id='prop-heathridge' and id='prop-waggrakine'. RubbishBin and BankTransactions are empty (no docs deleted, no bank statements uploaded) — empty states verified.
